content: New site variant live — three-column terminal layout inspired by DANY.
Exploring WebGPU for browser-based ML inference. Early experiments are promising — ran a small transformer entirely client-side.
The gap between 'demo' and 'production' in AI products is where most startups die. It's not the model — it's the 10,000 edge cases around the model.
Working on distributed systems at TikTok scale changes how you think about everything. When your 'edge case' affects 50 million users, there are no edge cases.
Rust's ownership model rewired how I think about state management everywhere. Even in TypeScript now, I instinctively think about who 'owns' a piece of data.
刚给网站加了 3D Receipt 物理模拟，Verlet integration 写起来比想象中简单。下一步想试试 soft body。
AI coding 的核心不是让 AI 写代码，是让 AI 理解你的 codebase context 然后做出符合整体架构的决策。
好的 DX 就是让开发者忘记工具的存在，直接进入心流。
Started building this site. Goal: not just a portfolio, but a living ecosystem that reflects how I think and build.
GSoC taught me that open source isn't about code — it's about building trust with a community of strangers through consistent, transparent work.
Shipped Pochi v1.0 to production — from prototype to real users.
Make it work, make it right, make it fast. — Kent Beck
The best code is no code at all.
Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication. — Leonardo da Vinci
